churn_detection.reasoning: The transcript covers the patient's full narrative from diagnosis to current treatment status without abrupt cutoff.

years_with_crohns.evidence: Just diagnosed with Crohn's last year but probably had it for decades.

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started with mesalamine and short prednisone course... Mesalamine alone wasn't enough.

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Prednisone helped but cardiologist worried about heart. Tapered quickly.

treatment_journey.name: sulfasalazine
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried sulfasalazine next. Terrible headaches, had to stop.

referral_pathway.name: ER
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally, severe pain sent me to ER.

referral_pathway.name: GI doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: CT showed inflammation throughout intestines. GI doctor said I'm lucky no major complications after so long untreated.
